title: Blinding Lights
why_this_song: Blinding Lights by The Weeknd (2019) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I can't see clearly when you're gone"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "You can turn me on with just a touch, baby"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I can't see clearly when you're gone"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: 'Cause I can see the sun light up the sky
So I hit the road in overdrive, baby, oh
I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "can't" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: I've been on my own for long enough
I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Weeknd one question about "Blinding Lights", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Weeknd sobre "Blinding Lights", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Blinding Lights" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Blinding Lights" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Blinding Lights" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Blinding Lights" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
